title: Git Configuration Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git setup and identity configuration.

questions.question: Which Git command is used to set your global user name?
Regarding Git configuration, what is the 'Global' level used for?
options: To apply a configuration to every repository for the current user
To set up a local Git server

questions.question: Which command is used to list all of your active Git configurations?
A situation where two or more transactions are waiting for each other to release a lock, resulting in a hang, is called a _______.
